decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-28 for the carbyne tier; the house code and rubric are not derived from any existing repository, so they post-date all model training cutoffs.

blocking: Publish invokes each current subscriber with msg, is safe to call concurrently with Subscribe, and does NOT hold b.mu while invoking the subscriber callbacks — so a subscriber that calls back into the Bus (e.g. Subscribe) cannot deadlock on the non-reentrant mutex.
The change modifies only bus.go and adds no dependency.

weighted.criterion: It snapshots/copies the subscriber slice WHILE holding the lock, then RELEASES the lock and calls the callbacks outside the critical section — not iterating with the lock held, and not reading b.subs with no lock.
